2026-0571
2026-06-11NRPublic Service Employment ActReappointment of a member of the Independent Advisory Board on Eligibility for Journalism Tax MeasuresReappointment of Linda Jean Hughes of Edmonton, Alberta, as a special adviser to the Minister of National Revenue, to serve as a member of the Independent Advisory Board on Eligibility for Journalism Tax Measures, to hold office during pleasure for a term of three years, on a part-time basis.N/A
subject: Reappointment of a member of the Independent Advisory Board on Eligibility for Journalism Tax Measures
precis: Reappointment of Linda Jean Hughes of Edmonton, Alberta, as a special adviser to the Minister of National Revenue, to serve as a member of the Independent Advisory Board on Eligibility for Journalism Tax Measures, to hold office during pleasure for a term of three years, on a part-time basis.
